subcodes.first_line: Blessed is he who hath turned toward the Most Great Ocean, every drop whereof proclaimeth that He is the God of the heavens and of the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لمن اقبل الی البحر الاعظم الذی کل قطره منه ینادی انه اله السموات و الارضین
subcodes.subjects: @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @praise and encouragement
